summary: Dividend Calculator PRO tested end-to-end. All 23 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend fully functional with correct dividend data, CASS calculations, tax 16%, and projections table. All specific values from the review request validated (TLV=2.375, H2O=8.989, SNN=2.702, SNP=0.122, BRD=1.058). CASS logic correct: small portfolio (<28200 RON) → CASS=0, large portfolio (>56400 RON) → CASS=5640 RON on 12 SMB.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/dividend-calculator/stocks returns 200 with 14 stocks sorted by yield descending
✅ TLV dividend: 2.3753 RON (EODHD live - matches expected ~2.375)
✅ BRD dividend: 1.058 RON (matches expected ~1.058)
✅ H2O dividend: 8.9889 RON (matches expected ~8.989)
✅ SNN dividend: 2.702 RON (matches expected ~2.702)
✅ SNP dividend: 0.122 RON (matches expected ~0.122)
✅ All stocks have required fields: symbol, name, dividend_per_share, dividend_yield, price
✅ POST /calculate - small portfolio (100 BRD shares, ~107.52 RON gross) → CASS=0, datorat=False
✅ summary.cass.plafon present ('sub 6 SMB — CASS 0')
✅ summary.total_net_dupa_cass present and correct
✅ tax_info.impozit_dividende contains '16%'
✅ Projections include impozit_16pct, cass, net_final_dupa_cass for each year
✅ POST /calculate - large portfolio (7000 H2O shares, ~62,922 RON gross > 56400) → CASS=5640 on 12 SMB
✅ total_net_dupa_cass = total_net - cass_amount calculation verified
✅ settings.tax_rate_2026 = 16.0
✅ Holdings have correct tax_16_percent (16% of annual_dividend_gross)
✅ 5-year projections grow correctly with dividend_growth_rate=3%
✅ Frontend: /calculator-dividende loads correctly with 'Calculator Dividende BVB' heading
✅ Frontend: Acțiuni cu Dividende tab shows 14 stock rows sorted by yield
✅ Frontend: TLV, BRD, H2O, SNN, SNP all present in stocks tab
✅ Frontend: Quick add buttons show FP 9.7%, TLV 6.6%, H2O 6.1%, SNN 5.5%, SNP 4.7%
✅ Frontend: 'Calcul Fiscal 2026' section visible after calculation
✅ Frontend: 'Impozit 16%' line visible in fiscal breakdown
✅ Frontend: 'CASS' section visible (shows '0 RON (sub prag)' for small portfolio)
✅ Frontend: 'NET FINAL (după impozit + CASS)' line visible
✅ Frontend: Projections table has columns: An, Dividend Brut, Impozit 16%, CASS, NET Final, Cumulat NET, Yield/Cost
✅ Frontend: CASS column shows '—' (dash) for small portfolio with zero CASS
✅ Frontend: TLV Div/Acț = 2.3753 RON, H2O Div/Acț = 8.9889 RON in results
✅ Frontend: Tax calculation correct: TLV impozit=-38.00 RON (237.53×0.16), H2O impozit=-143.82 RON (898.89×0.16)
critical_code_review_comments: SNP fallback dividend_per_share is 0.0578 but the review request expected ~0.122. The live EODHD data returns 0.122 RON (sum of last 12M payments) which is correct. The fallback value 0.0578 is just the single confirmed payment. This is acceptable behavior.

ONE (One United Properties): Fallback is 0.36 RON (per payment) but live data returns 0.72 RON (2 semiannual payments × 0.36 = 0.72). The note says 'dividende semestriale' so the live EODHD sum-of-12M logic correctly returns 0.72. Review request expected 0.72 so this is correct.

TEL (Transelectrica): Shows 5.930 RON via EODHD live (includes exceptional dividend 3.81 RON from jul 2025 + regular 2.12 RON). This explains the high value vs fallback 2.12 RON. The note in fallback already mentions the 3.81 RON exceptional dividend.
FP (Fondul Proprietatea): Shows 0.053 RON EODHD live vs fallback 0.0409. Acceptable variance.

Minor: The payout_ratio field in the DividendStocksTable frontend component is always shown as '%' without data (API doesn't return payout_ratio). The Payout column is always empty. This is a minor UI issue.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dividend Calculator PRO is fully working. Key verified values: TLV=2.3753 RON (EODHD live), H2O=8.9889 RON, SNN=2.702 RON, SNP=0.122 RON, BRD=1.058 RON. CASS thresholds: sub 28200 RON→CASS=0, 28200-56400→CASS=2820 RON (6 SMB), >56400→CASS=5640 RON (12 SMB). Tax rate 16% (Legea 141/2025). Frontend at /calculator-dividende: stocks tab shows 14 stocks, calculator tab shows fiscal breakdown with CASS and projections table with Impozit 16%/CASS/NET Final columns. Minor: Payout column is always empty (API doesn't provide payout_ratio).
